CustomField.description: Add API of the currency field on the Asset object to be used for Gain/Loss calculation. If left blank, the system will use Accounting Book Value from Asset for the calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Add API of the currency field on the Asset object to be used for Gain/Loss calculation. If left blank, the system will use Accounting Book Value from Asset for the calculation.
CustomField.label: Field for Gain/Loss calculation
